pre_capture_js: (() => { const btn = document.querySelector("gs-nav-button[data-qa-id='rosteringScenarios'] a.nav-button.nav-button--active"); const tip = document.querySelector("gs-tooltip p.tooltip"); if (!btn || !tip) return; const r = btn.getBoundingClientRect(); tip.style.position = 'fixed'; tip.style.left = `${Math.round(r.left + r.width / 2)}px`; tip.style.top = `${Math.round(r.bottom + 8)}px`; tip.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)'; tip.style.margin = '0'; tip.style.zIndex = '10001'; })();
